publishedAbstract: - The pod `rook-ceph-nfs-ocs-storagecluster-cephnfs` is failing to start after ODF was upgraded to 4.18.3.- The pod `rook-ceph-nfs-ocs-storagecluster-cephnfs` is in CLBO- `rook-ceph-nfs-ocs-storagecluster-cephnfs` state: ~~~ 2025-05-15T07:29:14.946635299Z 15/05/2025 07:29:14: epoch 682597ca: openshift-storage-ocs-storagecluster-cephnfs: nfs-ganesha-1[main] main:NFS STARTUP:CRIT:Error setting parameters from configuration file. ~~~
publishedTitle: The rook-ceph-nfs pod is in clbo after ODF was upgraded to 4.18.3
